Short CV

Engin Çakar was born in İznik, 1975. He graduated from Gülhane Military Medical Academy in 1999. Having completed his specialty training in the field of Physical Therapy and Rehabilitation in 2005, Çakar completed his master's degree in electrodiagnostic neurology at Marmara University. He also received the title of Expert in Algology in 2011.
